source_inspiration: Academic cofounder L1 — add within 10 plate scenario
stem_template: There are {N} {object} on a plate. {name} puts {K} more. How many {object} on the plate?

visual_manifest.art_brief: A plate with {N} {object} already on it and {K} more being placed. Warm cartoon style with a clear plate outline.
visual_manifest.alt_text: {N} {object} on a plate with {K} more being added.

misconceptions.feedback_child: Almost! You might have missed one. Count them all again carefully.
Don't forget the new {object}! {name} added {K} more to the plate.
There were already {N} {object} on the plate. Count those too!

socratic_feedback.on_correct: Great job! {N} + {K} = {N+K}. The plate now has {N+K} {object}!
socratic_feedback.on_incorrect: Let's count together. Start with the {N} on the plate, then add {K} more.
socratic_feedback.on_timeout: No rush! Count the {object} already on the plate first, then the new ones.
socratic_feedback.encouragement_after_retry: Almost there! Point to each {object} as you count.

author: acad-v2
